# reader

```go
import "im/internal/reader"
```

Package reader dispatches today's log file to a viewer.

## Variables

<a name="ErrNoFile"></a>ErrNoFile is returned when the daily log file does not exist.

```go
var ErrNoFile = errors.New("no entries for today")
```

<a name="ResolveViewer"></a>
## func ResolveViewer

```go
func ResolveViewer(filePath string) (binPath string, argv []string, err error)
```

ResolveViewer finds the first available viewer and returns the full path and argv. Exported for testability.

<a name="View"></a>
## func View

```go
func View(path string) error
```

View displays the file at path using the first available viewer. Replaces the current process via syscall.Exec.

<a name="viewer"></a>
## type viewer

viewer describes a candidate viewer command.

```go
type viewer struct {
    name string
    args []string // args to pass before the file path
}
```

<a name="candidates"></a>
### func candidates

```go
func candidates() []viewer
```

candidates in priority order: glow \-\-pager, rich \-\-markdown \-\-pager, $PAGER, cat.
